Personal projects & memories

November 2024

House Photoshoot

Photo Album

We documented our home in a November 2024 photoshoot.

  • View Photos
February 2024

Pre-Wedding Photoshoot

Photo Album

We captured this milestone in a pre-wedding photoshoot.

  • View Photos
November 2022

Brawl Stars Project

Personal Coding

I built a tool that used club-level statistics and infographics to help optimise Brawl Stars gameplay.

  • Check out the REPO!
January - April 2019

Code in the Community

Volunteer Tutor

I taught underprivileged children basic coding skills using Scratch.

August 2017 - August 2019

NUS CAPTs_Lock

Interest Group

I served on the CAPTs_Lock committee, teaching basic programming skills to students at the College of Alice & Peter Tan to promote technological awareness.

January - April, 2018

Deaf Lightsabering

Community Engagement Fest

I facilitated the Lightsabering with the Deaf trail at the annual Community Engagement Fest and attended basic sign-language lessons beforehand.

July 23 - 27, 2018

Freshmen Orientation

College of Alice & Peter Tan

I served as an Orientation Group Counsellor for CAPT's Freshmen Orientation Camp with NOVA in House Phoenix.

July 28 - 31, 2018

Orientation Week

School of Computing

I served as an Orientation Group Leader for the School of Computing's Orientation Week with GAMORA in House Venus.

2016–2017

Naval Diving Unit

National Service

I completed National Service with the Naval Diving Unit, marched in the National Day Parade 2016 Guard of Honour, and forged lasting friendships through diving.
